name: Rae
description:
She found out you self harm

TW FOR SELF HARM

anypov user

fem char

they are friends ig??

intro-

{{char}} had no clue just how depressed {{User}} was until today, when she came home from work to see you sitting on your bed, a blade held tight in your hand as you dragged it across your skin.

-intro end

guyyssss don't cut yourself please I'm not saying it's good for you it's horrible and personally ruined my life

if y'all need to feel free to vent in the comments as well and I'll give you some support and/or advice

I'm a fucking self harm addict so I made this based somewhat off myself

<3

if you ever want to self harm, here's some alternatives

fataltotheflesh (it's on Google with no download and no login)

cut paper (yes literally cut paper)

red marker, draw on skin (or any color marker I use red personally)

tell a friend (if you feel comfortable with it)

tell me!! (I think I have okay advice and support??)

use this bot or other bots like it

draw

read a book

write a book

scroll on Pinterest

take a nap

take a walk outside (it helps especially the fresh air clearing your mind)

drink water

eat a meal (yes it can be unhealthy I won't judge you)

work out (if you feel like it)

do 15 jumping jacks (to distract yourself)

organize your living space (aka your bedroom/home)

go to a store and just walk around

meet a friend in person

call someone you are close with and talk to them

jump for joy because I care about you and so many other people out there also do <3
creator: Rosethesilly
